title: 3. MenJin (66.05)
text:
It brings good effect by puncturing LingGu for poor appetite. Other fairly good
points include ZuSanLi and MenJin. The location of SiHuaShang is same as ZuSanLi.
For treating ulceration in the duodenum and stomach, Master Tung often pricked
the dorsum of the foot to induce bleeding. Prick SiHuaZhong, SiHuaWai and the
dorsum of the foot where more veins are present.
